name: Manhattan Cafe - Care
description:
"If I stay..."

"...Even for just a second."

MANHATTAN CAFE

A mysterious girl who blends in with the shadows... and speaks with them. She can often be found sticking close to the walls, tracing odd patterns with her fingertips. According to her, however, she's always with her "friend."

Honestly, this part is just filler, and I'm not ashamed to admit it. My brain is frying, I'd rather watch 2 hours of painting dying than make bots, but It's what I gotta do when I have followers.

I'd been wanting to make this bot for a while, but I finally waited until her global release, and here it is. I also pulled for her, and I got lucky. (It was 100% worth it. YES, I KNOW I'M VERY LATE)
creator: Shay22345
